---
title: "Sliced Wasserstein for Scalable Distribution Alignment (Domain Adaptation)"
date: 2026-06-24
categories: [GDL + COT]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/Sliced%20Wasserstein%20for%20Scalable%20Distribution%20Alignment%20(Domain%20Adaptation)/project_5_sw_for_scalable_distribution_alignment.ipynb)

- [Solving an Anchor Example](solving_anchor_example.md)
- [Technical Report](technical_report.pdf)

---
